EZ-USB NX2LP(TM) USB 2.0 NAND Flash Controller, 8 I/Os, 3 to 3.6 V, 0 to 70 degC,
Chip Resistor, 2-Leads, Body 1.00x0.50mm, IPC Medium Density
Wr-com Series, Right Angle Version 2.0; Connector SMT Plug / USB 2.0 Plug Type A S
Chip Capacitor, 4.7 uF, +/- 10%, 16 V, -55 to 85 degC, 0805 (2012 Metric), RoHS, T
